metadata.label: spam_fomorush
metadata.name: Spam fomorush
metadata.description: Linked spam cluster funded via Binance. 5 wallets running different campaigns: fomorush.io scam, refund-fees phishing, neurocity_ai_bot promo, wallet activation dust, htx address poisoning.

addresses.source: Sends 0.01 TON to 76,296 addresses with phishing comment linking to launch.fomorush.io. Funded by [EQDlATrM](https://tonviewer.com/EQDlATrMdbAeYnqjnQu0bh2I4hcKd8JNDrVDV8kU3pVFHINH) which also funds Addr #5 in this cluster.
addresses.comment: fomorush.io promotional spam. Highload_v3r1, 76K recipients, 0.01 TON each with phishing link.

addresses.source: Sends 0.0004 TON with comment 'Refund-fees' to 29,881 addresses. Funded Addr #5 and #7 in this cluster directly.
addresses.comment: Refund-fees phishing. Sends dust with social-engineering comment to trick users.

addresses.source: Sends 0.0031 TON with empty body to 9,046 addresses. Funded from Binance via cluster wallets. Funded Addr #5 in this cluster.
addresses.comment: Wallet activation dust spam. Mass-sends dust to nonexistent addresses for wallet initialization.

addresses.source: Sends 0.01 TON with comment 'neurocity_ai_bot' to 8,755 addresses. Funded by Addr #3 and #5 in this cluster.
addresses.comment: neurocity_ai_bot spam promotion. Highload_v3r1, batches of 100 messages.

addresses.source: Sends 0 TON to 2,988 addresses. Primary counterparty is htx-9tuqx5jg-coin.ton — a .ton domain impersonating HTX exchange. Funded by Addr #2 in this cluster.
addresses.comment: HTX address poisoning. Zero-value sends to appear in recipient tx history with htx-impersonation domain.
